### 📦 File Rilis
- `AlyaaFlorist-Setup-x64.exe` (rekomendasi untuk user umum)
- `AlyaaFlorist-v{{version}}-windows-x64.zip` (opsional)

### ⚙️ Catatan
- Platform: Windows x64
- Build mode: Release

### 🚀 Cara Install (Windows)
1. Download `AlyaaFlorist-Setup-x64.exe`
2. Jalankan installer
3. Centang desktop shortcut (opsional)
4. Selesai, buka **Alyaa Florist** dari Start Menu/Desktop
